notes: v9.90.27: clock_monotonic_fix. Keeps estimated clock monotonic during WiFi-offline operation, persists estimated time before restart/deep sleep with sleep offset, fixes exit_time earlier than enter_time using duration_sec, fills missing MAC in event_id, widens long-occupancy clock correction to 3 days, and clears occupancy checkpoint immediately after NVS event save to avoid duplicate overlapping events.
